name: costrict-web
description: AI Agent Platform - Integrating Casdoor and buildwithclaude

scripts.dev:api: node scripts/sync-env-server.js && cd server && go run ./cmd/api
scripts.dev:worker: node scripts/sync-env-server.js && cd server && go run ./cmd/worker
scripts.dev:web: node scripts/sync-env.js && cd web/web-ui && npm run dev
scripts.dev:all: concurrently "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:worker" "npm run dev:gateway" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.build: npm run build:api && npm run build:worker && npm run build:gateway
